message:
chore: refresh extension entry scan, validated manifest, and perf budget reports

- docs/extension-entry-scan.json: refresh extension entry point scan
  data with updated metadata for newly added npm extension artifacts
- tests/ext_conformance/VALIDATED_MANIFEST.json: add validated manifest
  entries for the 9 new npm extension packages (agentsbox, mitsupi,
  pi-extensions, pi-interactive-shell, pi-mcp-adapter, pi-package-test,
  pi-powerline-footer, shitty-extensions, verioussmith-pi-openrouter)
- tests/perf/reports: regenerate PERF_BUDGETS.md and budget_summary.json
  with updated timestamps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
